cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the broad range of benefits and compensation packages offered, though perceptions of quality vary.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members appreciate the company's approach to work-life balance and the support for professional growth.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees find the workplace challenging and rewarding, while others express frustration over limited advancement opportunities.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: A collaborative environment and supportive team networks are frequently cited as positive aspects of the work experience.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: While some employees feel the company prioritizes safety and stability, others report a highly negative experience.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: High-pressure environments and long hours are significant sources of stress for some employees.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees report feeling undervalued and overlooked, particularly regarding compensation increases and career progression.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Inflexible scheduling and heavy workloads make it difficult for some employees to maintain a healthy work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Concerns regarding favoritism, job security, and toxic office politics negatively impact some employees.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report feelings of isolation or frustration with company policies regarding attendance and compensation.
